title: subgraph-module-pattern
summary: Use subgraphs to package repeated or complex workflow sections as reusable nodes with exposed typed slots.
use_when: User wants to clean up a huge workflow, reuse an inpaint/upscale/detailer section, or share a module.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: subgraph-blueprint-packaging
summary: Package reusable subgraphs in a custom node directory so they appear as subgraph blueprints.
use_when: User wants reusable modules shipped with the AIWF node pack or a one-click install.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: switch-vs-soft-switch
summary: Use normal switches for simple typed choice; use soft/lazy switches when unused branches are expensive or should not execute.
use_when: User wants optional branches without loading every model or running every path.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: bypass-mute-vs-runtime-routing
summary: Distinguish UI bypass/mute or app-side pruning from runtime control flow.
use_when: User asks how to disable branches, avoid errors, or create optional workflow stages.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: master-control-panel-pattern
summary: Collect safe controls in a visible control area and hide internal implementation complexity.
use_when: User wants an app-like workflow or easier UI for beginners.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: workflow-as-app-contract
summary: Treat node IDs, input names, output nodes, model requirements, and value ranges as a stable contract for automation.
use_when: User drives ComfyUI from Gradio, scripts, or a one-click app.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: output-selector-pattern
summary: Use explicit output selection when a workflow can return preview, final, mask, latent, video, or debug outputs.
use_when: User wants one workflow with multiple possible outputs.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: module-boundary-pattern
summary: Place subgraph boundaries at natural datatype and responsibility boundaries, not in the middle of tightly coupled logic.
use_when: User asks where to group nodes or why a subgraph is hard to reuse.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: graph-expansion-developer-pattern
summary: Use node expansion only for developer-grade dynamic graph construction when a node must expand into a subgraph at execution time.
use_when: User wants loops, programmatic subgraphs, or dynamic graph behavior.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: node-replacement-migration-pattern
summary: Use node replacement rules when a custom node changes names, inputs, outputs, or merges with another node.
use_when: User maintains a node pack and wants old workflows to keep loading.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: workflow-template-pattern
summary: Ship example_workflows templates with custom nodes so users can load working examples from the template browser.
use_when: User wants one-click examples with a node pack.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.

title: advanced-workflow-troubleshooting-pattern
summary: Diagnose red nodes and broken advanced workflows by checking missing nodes, datatype links, stale class types, renamed inputs, and branch-evaluation rules.
use_when: User loads a complex workflow and it fails.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, source anchors, and relevant pattern guide together. If API or datatype rules are involved, also retrieve lanes 31 and 32.
